tracks.rawText: 1:43Ritmillo4UploadPop punk, Distorted electric guitars play palm-muted eighth-note power chords during verses and open, sustained chords during choruses, A bright, punchy drum kit features a prominent snare on 2 and 4 with rapid sixteenth-note fills on the rack toms, The electric bass follows the guitar root notes with a picked, overdriven tone, The tempo is 165 BPM in 4/4 time, The arrangement alternates between dense, high-gain sections and stripped-back verses where the guitar volume is rolled back, A clean electric guitar lead plays a melodic, syncopated riff in the intro and bridge1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Ritmillo4

tracks.rawText: 3:30Tambora Crownv5Regional mexicana with a radiant brass fanfare, vihuela strums, and crisp requinto arpeggios over a driving tuba-pistón bass line, Tight tambora snare, tarola rolls, and hand percussion lift a bright major-key melody; polished ensemble vocals, accordion flourishes, and spacious plate reverb give it a celebratory, high-gloss punch1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Tambora Crown
